name: ECRO: Dwars Classic
description:
Chasing Classics Series - Chasing Dwars, Class 2
Course: Peaky Pave, France. 30.8km, 369m elevation (12.0m/km - rolling+).
Predicted duration: 48-50min | NP: ~257W (92% FTP) | IF: 0.92 | TSS: ~70
Avg speed: ~37-38 km/h (race pace, draft-calibrated from ECRO data)

COURSE: Normandy pens > Les Intestins rolling > Aqueduc KOM Reverse > Petit KOM finish climb (5-6min sustained)

RACE EXECUTION:
The race is decided on the Petit KOM - a 5-6min sustained climb at the finish. Everything before it is positioning.
- Stay in the bunch through Les Intestins rolling section - conserve watts, use draft
- Do not spike power on Aqueduc KOM Reverse - hold position, do not chase attacks
- Arrive at Petit KOM base with energy reserves intact
- Commit fully on Petit KOM - target ~340-360W for the full 5-6min climb
- This is NOT a sprint finish - it is a sustained climb to the line

POWER TARGETS:
- Rolling/flat sections: 220-240W (stay in draft)
- Aqueduc KOM Reverse: 270-290W (controlled)
- Petit KOM finish: 340-360W (full commitment)

Post-race: log NP, decoupling%, peak HR, position on Petit KOM.

- 49m 92%

name: ECRO: Vlaanderen Monument
description:
Chasing Classics Series - Chasing Vlaanderen, Monument, Class 1
Course: Cobbled Climbs x5, Richmond. 46.2km, 630m elevation (13.6m/km - hilly). 5 laps x 9.2km.
Predicted duration: 68-72min | NP: ~250W (89% FTP) | IF: 0.89-0.91 | TSS: ~95
Avg speed: ~38-40 km/h (race pace, draft-calibrated from ECRO data)

COURSE PER LAP: Libby Hill cobbled ~90-120sec > 23rd Street steep ~20-30sec > Governor Street ~180-240sec > false-flat finish
Total climbing per lap: 126m. Three distinct VO2 efforts per lap, 15 total across the race.

RACE REALITY:
Lap 1 is a selection event. Front group attacks immediately. At 85.5kg the hilly handicap (-60) means gaps open on Governor Street. Once dropped very hard to get back on.

EXECUTION:
- Lap 1: Go hard from the gun. Hold on as long as possible. Do NOT hold back power - make lap 1 count.
- Libby Hill each lap: ~340-370W for 90-120sec. Cobbled surface partially neutralises w/kg.
- 23rd Street each lap: ~380-420W for 20-30sec. Very steep, short anaerobic spike.
- Governor Street each lap: ~310-340W for 3-4min. Ride your pace, do not chase gaps.
- If/when dropped: Settle into hardest sustainable pace. Do not soft-pedal. Consistency across laps 2-5 gains positions as others fade.
- Lap 5: Empty the tank on every climb.

Post-race: Log lap splits if available, NP, decoupling%, peak HR per climb.

- 70m 89%
